arts.ttl: A gamble worth taking: Chelsea deal shows Arsenal can turn their season around with Marcus Rashford move
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford’s days at Manchester United are surely numbered – something that would have seemed unthinkable a year or so ago, but could this be a major transfer market opportunity for Arsenal? arts.ttl: Arsenal injuries: Every player out of Carabao Cup quarter-final against Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Summer arrival Riccardo Calafiori missed almost a month of football because of a knee injury over the autumn and his workload was managed by Arteta once he returned to the fold. The Gunners have been blessed with kind draws in the Carabao Cup so far, and although Crystal Palace enter Wednesday's quarter-final in good form, this is a game Arsenal are expected to win.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta had no place for me at Arsenal - Now I can prove him wrong with Crystal Palace - football.london
arts.sum: Crystal Palace star Eddie Nketiah will be keen to make an impact against former club Arsenal in two games over the next three days. “Obviously, I’ve been at Arsenal for 11 years, so it was like a home for me,” he told Palace club media .

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Crystal Palace TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time
arts.sum: With Sky broadcasting the game between Arsenal and Crystal Palace, the match is also available to live stream. Victory for Arsenal over Palace would see them earn a place in the semi-final of the Carabao Cup and, in turn, find themselves just two games away from a final at Wembley Stadium.

arts.ttl: “I deserve to play there” – Crystal Palace player determined to fulfil Champions League ‘dream’
arts.sum: Ismaïla Sarr was one of the new faces to arrive at Crystal Palace in the summer window. arts.ttl: When is the Carabao Cup draw? Arsenal and Tottenham target semi-final place
arts.sum: The Carabao Cup semi-final draw is scheduled to take place on Thursday evening - after the conclusion of Spurs' game vs Manchester United at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur will both be looking to secure their place in the semi-final draw for the Carabao Cup as their respective charges continue this week.
